The best reformulation outperforms hierarchical Bayesian estimation by 8\% in holdout log-likelihood and 3.6\% in hit rate, running 16 times faster, a practical advantage for large-scale demand estimation. The advantage is largest in the medium-data regime (10--40 purchase occasions per consumer), where parametric Bayesian shrinkage most distorts estimates for atypical consumers. Fine-tuning on population choice data provides additional gains for consumers with shallow purchase histories, where in-context learning has limited individual-specific signal to condition on. These results establish a principled approach for applying foundation models to consumer choice problems more broadly.
papers.title_zh: 用于离散选择估计的表格基础模型
papers.summary_zh: 表格基础模型 (TFM) 通过上下文学习生成结构化数据的预测，无需针对特定任务进行估计。我们询问 TFM 是否可以有效地应用于离散选择（营销和运营中的中央需求估计框架），并发现直接应用 TFM 的性能有限。这种差距是结构性的：TFM 假设与行无关的观察结果，而离散选择本质上是设定值的，并且受到持续的消费者偏好异质性的影响。我们提出了一种重新表述，在基于行的学习框架内编码选择集依赖性和个体异质性。在酸奶扫描仪面板上进行评估，个体水平的异质性编码是预测准确性的主要驱动因素。最佳重构方法在保留对数似然方面优于分层贝叶斯估计 8%，在命中率方面优于分层贝叶斯估计 3.6%，运行速度快 16 倍，这对于大规模需求估计而言具有实际优势。在中等数据体系（每个消费者 10--40 次购买次数）中优势最大，其中参数贝叶斯收缩最扭曲对非典型消费者的估计。对人口选择数据的微调为购买历史浅的消费者提供了额外的收益，因为情境学习限制了个人特定信号的条件。这些结果建立了一种原则性方法，可以更广泛地将基础模型应用于消费者选择问题。

papers.title: QFireNet: A Quantum-Enhanced U-Net for Wildfire Segmentation from Sentinel-2 Imagery
papers.summary: Wildfire detection from satellite imagery is a semantic image segmentation problem that has proven to be difficult due to challenges such as class imbalance, feature complexity, and atmospheric interference. In this paper, we build on the foundational U-Net image segmentation model to develop a quantum-hybrid solution in hopes of more effectively modeling the high-dimensional spectral feature space of the Sen2Fire dataset. We inject a variational quantum circuit in the bottleneck portion of U-Net, specifically the QuFeX and QB-Net ansatzes. We test a classical Feature Pyramid Network (FPN) for further comparative analysis of the model, and we also explore classical improvements to the U-Net model and its training process, including a compression of parameters, alternative loss functions, and uniform mixing of input data. Our primary finding is that under matched conditions, both QB-Net (with an $F_1$ score of 31.18) and QuFeX ($F_1 = 30.79$) outperformed the classical U-Net baseline results ($F_1 = 28.71$). Additionally, the classical FPN achieved a comparable score of 31.13. A crucial finding was that data mixing removed a significant domain shift between the geographically-separated train and test sets, which boosted the classical FPN $F_1$ score to 39.76. We validate the architecture's robustness and generalizability to the wildfire detection problem via cross-dataset transfer on the California Burned Areas (CaBuAr) dataset. Overall, we find that quantum machine learning has potential to provide an advantage in the problem of wildfire image segmentation, and further experiments will continue to validate and expand upon this finding.
papers.title_zh: QFireNet：用于从 Sentinel-2 图像中进行野火分割的量子增强型 U-Net
papers.summary_zh: 卫星图像野火检测是一个语义图像分割问题，由于类别不平衡、特征复杂性和大气干扰等挑战，该问题已被证明是困难的。在本文中，我们在基本的 U-Net 图像分割模型的基础上开发了一种量子混合解决方案，希望能够更有效地对 Sen2Fire 数据集的高维光谱特征空间进行建模。我们在 U-Net 的瓶颈部分注入变分量子电路，特别是 QuFeX 和 QB-Net ansatze。我们测试了经典的特征金字塔网络（FPN），以进一步对模型进行比较分析，并且我们还探索了 U-Net 模型及其训练过程的经典改进，包括参数压缩、替代损失函数和输入数据的均匀混合。我们的主要发现是，在匹配条件下，QB-Net（$F_1$ 得分为 31.18）和 QuFeX（$F_1 = 30.79$）都优于经典的 U-Net 基线结果（$F_1 = 28.71$）。此外，经典 FPN 的可比分数为 31.13。一个重要的发现是，数据混合消除了地理上分离的训练集和测试集之间的显着域转移，这将经典 FPN $F_1$ 得分提高到 39.76。我们通过加州烧毁地区 (CaBuAr) 数据集上的跨数据集传输来验证该架构对野火检测问题的鲁棒性和通用性。总的来说，我们发现量子机器学习有潜力在野火图像分割问题上提供优势，进一步的实验将继续验证和扩展这一发现。

papers.title: Self-Supervised Visual Representation Learning: Pretrain-Finetuning or Joint Training?
papers.summary: Self-supervision is a powerful technique for learning visual representations from unlabeled data. Existing techniques primarily adopt a two-stage approach for self-supervised learning (SSL): a pretraining stage on unlabeled data followed by a finetuning stage on labeled data. While this pipeline has demonstrated extreme effectiveness, the interaction between self-supervised and supervised learning objectives remains insufficiently understood. In this work, we systematically investigate whether jointly optimizing the self-supervised and supervised objectives during training provides a better alternative. We compare two training paradigms: (1) the aforementioned pretraining followed by finetuning (PFT) and (2) joint training (JT), where self-supervised and supervised losses are optimized simultaneously in the same network. Across eight representative SSL methods and diverse computer vision tasks on natural, medical, crisis response, and remote sensing data, we evaluate performance under varying percentages of labeled data. Our results reveal that the relative effectiveness of PFT and JT depends strongly on the task at hand, the availability of labeled data, and the complexity of the domain. We find that JT consistently improves data and training efficiency while being robust in low-label settings, while PFT is more reliable in more specialized domains. We further analyze representation quality, robustness, and cross-domain generalization, providing new insights into how self-supervised and supervised objectives interact during optimization. We establish a comprehensive empirical benchmark for hybrid SSL-based semi-supervised learning and offer practical guidance for selecting appropriate training strategies across diverse vision applications.
papers.title_zh: 自监督视觉表示学习：预训练微调还是联合训练？
papers.summary_zh: 自我监督是一种从未标记数据中学习视觉表示的强大技术。现有技术主要采用两阶段方法进行自监督学习（SSL）：对未标记数据进行预训练阶段，然后对标记数据进行微调阶段。尽管该流程已表现出极高的有效性，但自我监督和监督学习目标之间的相互作用仍然没有得到充分理解。在这项工作中，我们系统地研究了在训练期间联合优化自监督和监督目标是否提供了更好的选择。我们比较两种训练范例：（1）前面提到的预训练，然后进行微调（PFT）和（2）联合训练（JT），其中自监督和监督损失在同一网络中同时优化。通过八种代表性的 SSL 方法和自然、医学、危机应对和遥感数据的各种计算机视觉任务，我们评估了不同百分比的标记数据下的性能。我们的结果表明，PFT 和 JT 的相对有效性在很大程度上取决于手头的任务、标记数据的可用性以及领域的复杂性。我们发现 JT 持续提高数据和训练效率，同时在低标签设置中保持稳健，而 PFT 在更专业的领域中更可靠。我们进一步分析表示质量、鲁棒性和跨域泛化，为优化过程中自监督和监督目标如何相互作用提供新的见解。我们为基于 SSL 的混合半监督学习建立了全面的实证基准，并为在不同的视觉应用中选择适当的训练策略提供了实用指导。

papers.title: A Masked Autoencoder Approach to Unsupervised Steel Surface Defect Recognition
papers.summary: Automated visual inspection of steel surface defects is a recurring quality control task in which labeled defect data is scarce and costly to obtain, while unlabeled surface images are abundant, which motivates self supervised methods that learn useful representations without class labels. A Transformer based Masked Autoencoder is used here to learn representations of steel surface defects for unsupervised grouping. During pretraining, 75% of the input image patches are randomly masked, and a lightweight decoder reconstructs the masked regions from the visible 25%. The encoder is trained jointly with an auxiliary defect localization objective, used only as a training signal and not evaluated as a detector. The decoder reaches a structural similarity score of 0.92 and a mean squared error of 0.47. Features from the pretrained encoder are then clustered using UMAP for dimensionality reduction and Agglomerative clustering, reaching a Hungarian matched accuracy of 91.3% against the six known defect categories.
papers.title_zh: 无监督钢表面缺陷识别的屏蔽自动编码器方法
papers.summary_zh: 钢材表面缺陷的自动视觉检测是一项经常性的质量控制任务，其中标记的缺陷数据稀缺且获取成本高昂，而未标记的表面图像丰富，这激发了自监督方法，这些方法可以在没有类别标签的情况下学习有用的表示。这里使用基于 Transformer 的 Masked Autoencoder 来学习钢材表面缺陷的表示，以进行无监督分组。在预训练期间，75% 的输入图像块被随机屏蔽，轻量级解码器从可见的 25% 中重建屏蔽区域。编码器与辅助缺陷定位目标联合训练，仅用作训练信号，不作为检测器进行评估。解码器的结构相似度得分为 0.92，均方误差为 0.47。然后使用 UMAP 进行降维和聚合聚类，对来自预训练编码器的特征进行聚类，针对六种已知缺陷类别达到 91.3% 的匈牙利匹配精度。

papers.title: Domain-Incremental Remote Sensing Change Detection via Difference-Guided Adaptation and Frequency-Decoupled Distillation
papers.summary: Remote sensing change detection (RSCD) models are prone to catastrophic forgetting when incrementally adapted to new domains. Existing domain-incremental learning (DIL) methods mainly preserve image-level representations but often overlook bitemporal discrepancy cues, which are critical for robust change detection under domain shifts. To address this limitation, we propose DG-FDD, a domain-incremental change detection framework that integrates Difference-Guided Adaptation and Frequency-Decoupled Distillation. Specifically, the Difference-Guided Dynamic Adapter (DGDA) models bitemporal feature discrepancies to promote change-aware feature adaptation and reduce domain-specific interference. Meanwhile, the Frequency-Decoupled Knowledge Distillation strategy with Cross-domain Synthesis (FDKD-CS) separates structural information from domain style in the frequency domain, enabling stable knowledge transfer without historical data. Extensive experiments on three public high-resolution RSCD datasets under two- and three-domain incremental protocols demonstrate that DG-FDD effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting. Compared with independently trained single-task models, DG-FDD records mean relative changes in F1 and IoU of only -0.23% and -0.45%, respectively, across six two-domain sequences, and -0.69% and -1.31%, respectively, across the three evaluated three-domain sequences. These results indicate a favorable stability-plasticity balance between historical knowledge retention and new-domain adaptation in continual cross-domain change detection.
papers.title_zh: 通过差分引导适应和频率解耦蒸馏进行域增量遥感变化检测
papers.summary_zh: 遥感变化检测（RSCD）模型在逐步适应新领域时很容易出现灾难性遗忘。现有的域增量学习（DIL）方法主要保留图像级表示，但常常忽略双时态差异线索，这对于域转移下的鲁棒变化检测至关重要。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了 DG-FDD，这是一种集成了差异引导适应和频率解耦蒸馏的域增量变化检测框架。具体来说，差异引导动态适配器（DGDA）对双时态特征差异进行建模，以促进变化感知特征适应并减少特定领域的干扰。同时，跨域综合的频率解耦知识蒸馏策略（FDKD-CS）将频域中的结构信息与领域风格分开，无需历史数据即可实现稳定的知识转移。在两域和三域增量协议下对三个公共高分辨率 RSCD 数据集进行的广泛实验表明，DG-FDD 可以有效减轻灾难性遗忘。与独立训练的单任务模型相比，DG-FDD 记录在 6 个二域序列中的 F1 和 IoU 平均相对变化分别仅为 -0.23% 和 -0.45%，在三个评估的三域序列中分别为 -0.69% 和 -1.31%。这些结果表明，在持续跨域变化检测中，历史知识保留和新域适应之间存在良好的稳定性-可塑性平衡。

papers.title: Autonomous Tracking and Terminal Guidance of Moving Targets for Fixed-Wing UAVs
papers.summary: This study introduces a unified control framework for fixed-wing unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) fitted with a pan-tilt (PT) camera, intended to perform an end-to-end mission spanning from initial target detection to accurate terminal engagement. The proposed system employs a three-phase strategy: a vision-based target acquisition phase, an NMPC-based tracking phase, and a terminal guidance phase. During tracking, the framework uses an Unscented Kalman Filter (UKF) to fuse YOLO-based visual detections with inertial measurements, enabling robust target state estimation under unknown dynamics. To ensure reliable visual contact, we introduce a constraint-aware Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) strategy that incorporates Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) to explicitly prevent UAV self-occlusion -- a common limitation in fixed-wing tracking. Upon satisfying terminal engagement conditions, the system seamlessly transitions control to a quaternion-based Biased Proportional Navigation Guidance (BPNG) law, enforcing precise impact angle constraints. High-fidelity simulations demonstrate that the framework achieves stable, robust tracking and accurate terminal interception while strictly respecting the vehicle's dynamic limits and camera field-of-view constraints.
papers.title_zh: 固定翼无人机运动目标自主跟踪与末端制导
papers.summary_zh: 本研究介绍了一种用于配备云台（PT）相机的固定翼无人机（UAV）的统一控制框架，旨在执行从初始目标检测到精确终端交战的端到端任务。所提出的系统采用三阶段策略：基于视觉的目标捕获阶段、基于NMPC的跟踪阶段和终端制导阶段。在跟踪过程中，该框架使用无味卡尔曼滤波器 (UKF) 将基于 YOLO 的视觉检测与惯性测量融合，从而在未知动态下实现稳健的目标状态估计。为了确保可靠的视觉接触，我们引入了一种约束感知的非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）策略，该策略结合了控制屏障函数（CBF）来明确防止无人机自遮挡——这是固定翼跟踪中的常见限制。在满足终端交战条件后，系统将控制无缝过渡到基于四元数的偏置比例导航制导（BPNG）定律，强制执行精确的撞击角度约束。高保真模拟表明，该框架实现了稳定、鲁棒的跟踪和准确的终端拦截，同时严格遵守车辆的动态限制和相机视场约束。

papers.title: Weakly Supervised Spatio-Temporal Candidate Discovery of Dairy Farm Sites from Seasonal Satellite Imagery
papers.summary: Farm site discovery from satellite imagery is a spatiotemporal candidate ranking problem because farm evidence is distributed across pasture, field boundaries, roads, buildings, and seasonal vegetation patterns. Direct farm labels are often incomplete, which makes fully supervised detection difficult. This paper proposes a weakly supervised pipeline for ranking dairy farm candidate clusters from seasonal Sentinel imagery and open map priors. The method uses aligned spring, summer, and autumn image tiles from County Cork, Ireland, with spectral bands, vegetation indices, built area indices, and a pasture channel. A Barlow Twins encoder learns multi-season tile embeddings without farm labels. In parallel, weak OpenStreetMap farm priors are split into a prior and a held-out set. Prior features support a rule-based tile score that combines farm proximity, seasonal pasture evidence, and summer greenness, while held-out features are reserved only for proxy evaluation. The rule score is smoothed over a spatial representation graph using geographic proximity and embedding similarity, and high-scoring tiles are grouped into ranked candidate clusters. From 26,722 valid tiles, the main run selects 535 high-confidence tiles and forms 71 candidate clusters. The top 5 clusters achieve 0.60 precision within 500 m and 0.80 precision within 1000 m of held-out OpenStreetMap farm features. The top 10 clusters achieve 0.40 precision within 500 m and 0.80 precision within 1000 m. The results show that seasonal representation learning and weak geographic priors can reduce large satellite image collections into compact candidate sets for human review.
papers.title_zh: 从季节性卫星图像弱监督时空候选发现奶牛场地点
papers.summary_zh: 从卫星图像中发现农场地点是一个时空候选排名问题，因为农场证据分布在牧场、田地边界、道路、建筑物和季节性植被模式中。直接农场标签通常不完整，这使得全面监督检测变得困难。本文提出了一种弱监督管道，用于根据季节性哨兵图像和开放地图先验对奶牛场候选集群进行排名。该方法使用来自爱尔兰科克郡的对齐的春季、夏季和秋季图像图块，以及光谱带、植被指数、建筑面积指数和牧场通道。 Barlow Twins 编码器无需农场标签即可学习多季节图块嵌入。同时，弱 OpenStreetMap 农场先验被分为先验集和保留集。先前的特征支持基于规则的图块评分，该评分结合了农场邻近度、季节性牧场证据和夏季绿化度，而保留的特征仅保留用于代理评估。使用地理邻近性和嵌入相似性在空间表示图上平滑规则得分，并且高分图块被分组为排名的候选簇。主运行从 26,722 个有效图块中选择 535 个高置信度图块并形成 71 个候选簇。前 5 个集群在保留的 OpenStreetMap 场要素的 500 m 范围内实现 0.60 精度，在 1000 m 范围内实现 0.80 精度。前10个簇在500 m内实现0.40精度，在1000 m内实现0.80精度。结果表明，季节性表示学习和弱地理先验可以将大型卫星图像集合减少为紧凑的候选集，以供人工审查。

papers.title: Tracing Agentic Failure from the Flow of Success
papers.summary: Failure attribution for LLM-based agentic systems, i.e., identifying which steps in a failure trajectory caused the task to fail, is critical for debugging and improving these systems. Existing approaches either rely on prompting-based pipelines, which are computationally expensive, or require post-training on failure trajectories with step-level error annotations, which are costly to collect and difficult to scale. We argue that a practical failure attribution model should be lightweight and trainable without step-level supervision on failure data. To this end, we address unsupervised failure attribution, i.e., training exclusively on successful trajectories and identifying error steps at inference time given a failure trajectory. We propose OAT, which casts this problem as one-class learning with neural controlled differential equations, modeling the dynamical pattern of successful trajectories in latent space. At inference time, each step in a failure trajectory is assigned an anomaly score based on its deviation from the dynamics learned on successful trajectories, which is then used to form a set of error steps. With training on only 100 successful trajectories, experiments show that OAT is 200--5000 $\times$ faster than prompting-based baselines, and, at the same time, consistently outperforms them in both in-domain and out-of-distribution datasets with +20% and +7% F1 scores, respectively, demonstrating that OAT is a promising and efficient direction for diagnosing agentic system failures.
papers.title_zh: 从成功的流程中追踪代理失败
papers.summary_zh: 基于 LLM 的代理系统的故障归因，即识别故障轨迹中的哪些步骤导致任务失败，对于调试和改进这些系统至关重要。现有的方法要么依赖于基于提示的管道，这在计算上是昂贵的，要么需要使用步骤级错误注释对故障轨迹进行后期训练，这收集起来成本很高并且难以扩展。我们认为，实际的故障归因模型应该是轻量级的且可训练的，无需对故障数据进行步骤级监督。为此，我们解决了无监督的故障归因问题，即专门针对成功轨迹进行训练，并在给定故障轨迹的推理时识别错误步骤。我们提出了 OAT，它将这个问题转化为神经控制微分方程的一类学习，对潜在空间中成功轨迹的动态模式进行建模。在推理时，失败轨迹中的每个步骤都会根据其与成功轨迹上学到的动态的偏差分配一个异常分数，然后使用该分数形成一组错误步骤。通过仅对 100 个成功轨迹进行训练，实验表明 OAT 比基于提示的基线快 200--5000 $\times$，同时，在域内和分布外数据集中始终优于它们，F1 分数分别为 +20% 和 +7%，这表明 OAT 是诊断代理系统故障的一个有前途且有效的方向。
